scores.notes: Major issues include: company name missing spaces ('YONGFATTENTERPRISE' vs 'YONGFATT ENTERPRISE'), address severely garbled and incomplete ('A1OO JOHCRBAHRU' vs full address), date format corrupted ('25126018' vs '25/12/2018'), and total amount has minor error ('80:91' vs '80.90'). OCR captured much extraneous text not in ground truth and failed to preserve proper structure and formatting.
